subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Sadiq! God, exalted be His glory, hath created His servants for His recognition, and hath brought them forth from nothingness into being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد صادق حق جل جلاله عباد را لاجل عرفان خلق نموده و از عدم بوجود آورده و
subcodes.subjects: @purpose; goal of creation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
